channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Notre Dame Cathedral unveils its new interior 5 years after devastating fire
item.description: PARIS (AP) — After more than five years of frenetic reconstruction work, Notre Dame Cathedral showed its new self to the world Friday, with rebuilt soaring ceilings and creamy good-as-new stonework erasing somber memories of its devastating fire in 2019.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Russian defense minister visits North Korea for talks with military and political leaders
item.description: SEOUL, South Korea (AP) — Russian Defense Minister Andrei Belousov arrived in North Korea on Friday for talks with North Korean military and political leaders as the countries deepen their cooperation over Russia’s war in Ukraine.
item.dc:creator: KIM TONG-HYUNG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Negotiators get closer to agreeing on a plastic pollution treaty
item.description: BUSAN, South Korea (AP) — Negotiators working on a treaty to address the global crisis of plastic pollution inched closer to an agreement Friday, with more countries saying they want to address the total plastic on Earth.
item.dc:creator: JENNIFER McDERMOTT, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Scammers use Black Friday deals to trick unsuspecting shoppers: Protect yourself with these 3 tips
item.description: Fake e-Shops, bogus charities and sneaky "smishing" scams are especially prevalent around the holidays, a cybersecurity expert told Fox News Digital.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chad ends a defense cooperation agreement with France, its former colonial ruler
item.description: DAKAR, Senegal (AP) — Chad's government said it is ending a defense cooperation agreement with France, its former colonial ruler, to redefine the nation's sovereignty.
item.dc:creator: SAM MEDNICK, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Embattled Japan leader vows to cooperate with long-ignored opposition in bid to save his government
item.description: TOKYO (AP) — Embattled Japanese Prime Minister Shigeru Ishiba, who survived as leader after a major election loss by his governing coalition, promised Friday to work closely with the long-ignored opposition that is now the only way his minority government can stay in power.
item.dc:creator: MARI YAMAGUCHI, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Retailers bank on Black Friday to energize bargain-hungry holiday shoppers
item.description: After weeks of pushing early deals, retailers in the United States and some other countries are promising bigger discounts on Black Friday.
item.dc:creator: Anne D'Innocenzio, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Expert tips on how to avoid feeling drowsy after Thanksgiving dinner
item.description: Americans nationwide will enjoy a Thanksgiving dinner with all the fixings and will likely feel tired afterward.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, KTLA 5

item.title: Trump's tariffs in his first term did little to alter the economy, but this time could be different
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Donald Trump loved to use tariffs on foreign goods during his first presidency. But their impact was barely noticeable in the overall economy, even if their aftershocks were clear in specific industries. The data show they never fully delivered on his promised factory jobs.
item.dc:creator: JOSH BOAK, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade: Big balloons, wet weather and 21 protesters arrested
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade marched, soared and roared into its second century on Thursday despite a drenching rain and a brief disruption from pro-Palestinian demonstrators.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Thanksgiving morning Texas shooting leaves 2 dead, 2 wounded: 'Happens all too frequently,' police chief says
item.description: Two people were shot and killed and two others injured when a suspect opened fire at a San Antonio home on Thanksgiving morning, police said.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Arizona executions to resume, breaking 2-year pause during review of state death penalty procedures
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) — Executions will resume in Arizona following a two-year pause, the state's top prosecutor says.
item.dc:creator: ANITA SNOW, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Amazon workers on strike from Black Friday to Cyber Monday
item.description: (WFXR) - Amazons workers across 20 countries, including the United States, are striking against what the organizing labor union calls anti-worker and anti-democratic practices.
item.dc:creator: Sydney Jaxtheimer, ABC 4

item.title: Photos: 100 years of the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade
item.description: The parade in New York City, presented by department store chain Macy's, was first held in 1924 under the heading "Macy's Christmas Parade" to promote holiday sales and spotlight the newly expanded and, at the time, largest in the world Herald Square store in Manhattan.
item.dc:creator: Nicole Caldwell, Stacker, KRON4

item.title: Child's toes 'severed' by lawnmower at Utah daycare; state wants it to shut down
item.description: A childcare center in southern Utah is losing its license and must cease operations by Dec. 4 after a child's toes were "severed" by a lawnmower.
item.dc:creator: Trevor Myers, KRON4

item.title: Applebee's, IHOP to open first combo restaurant in US
item.description: Applebee's and IHOP are set to open a dual-branded restaurant in Seguin, Texas in early 2025, offering guests the best of both brands' menus and providing more choices, variety, and value.
item.dc:creator: Anna Roberts, KTLA 5

item.title: Americans' opinion of Republican Party on the rise
item.description: In the poll, 45 percent of Americans said they feel “favorable” toward the Republican Party, up 6 points from an Economist/YouGov poll in late October, when 39 percent said they felt favorable toward GOP.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, NewsNation

item.title: Sean 'Diddy' Combs denied bail for a third time
item.description: He was denied bail in September and earlier this month when the judge deemed Combs a flight risk because of his money and connections.
item.dc:creator: Katie Smith, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: 3 killed, 1 seriously injured in Tesla Cybertruck crash in Northern California
item.description: PIEDMONT, Calif. (AP) — Three people were killed and one seriously injured early Wednesday when a Tesla Cybertruck crashed and caught fire in Northern California, officials said.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Democrat Derek Tran defeats GOP Rep. Michelle Steel in Southern California swing House district
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Democrat Derek Tran ousted Republican U.S. Rep. Michelle Steel in a Southern California House district Wednesday that was specifically drawn to give Asian Americans a stronger voice on Capitol Hill.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL R. BLOOD, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: North Carolina siblings say late father is D.B. Cooper after finding alleged parachute in home: report
item.description: A pair io siblings believe their late father was D.B. Cooper after finding the alleged parachute used in the sky theft in their North Carolina home, according to media reports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Boulder Police address JonBenét Ramsey's case after Netflix docuseries premieres
item.description: Without specifically addressing the docuseries, Boulder Police called many of the claims in the show "completely false.
item.dc:creator: Maddie Rhodes, KRON4

item.title: Federal court dismisses defamation lawsuit against Fox News for Jan. 6 conspiracy theory
item.description: CROTON, N.Y. (AP) — A federal judge on Wednesday threw out a defamation lawsuit against Fox News by a former Donald Trump supporter who said he received death threats when the network aired false conspiracy theories about his involvement in the Jan. 6, 2021, Capitol insurrection.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Travelers who waited to make Thanksgiving trips are hitting the biggest crowds so far
item.description: Travelers who waited until the last day to make their Thanksgiving holiday treks need to be prepared for busy highways and the most crowded day yet this week at the nation's airports.
item.dc:creator: DAVID KOENIG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: A California woman was called into work on her day off. She left a lottery winner
item.description: Nobody likes being called into work on their day off. But for one California woman, a last-minute call-in would ultimately change her life for the better.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, ABC 4

item.title: Some of those Ocean Spray cranberries come from a bog in Massachusetts
item.description: MIDDLEBORO, Mass. (AP) — Weeks before Thanksgiving, some of the cranberries that will be on dinner plates Thursday were floating on the Rocky Meadow bog in southeastern Massachusetts. The cranberries have turned this pond pinkish crimson.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL CASEY, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: 3 Americans held for years in China have been released, White House says
item.description: Three American citizens imprisoned for years by China have been released and are returning to the United States, the White House said Wednesday, announcing a rare diplomatic agreement with Beijing in the final months of the Biden administration.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: A Catholic family's answer to opposing abortion: adopt, foster and vote
item.description: SUNBURY, Ohio (AP) — For the Young family in rural Sunbury, Ohio, activism begins at home. The conservative Catholic family chooses to live their anti-abortion beliefs through adoption, foster-parenting and raising their children to believe in the sanctity of life.
item.dc:creator: CAROLYN KASTER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: What dynamic pricing means for Black Friday shopping
item.description: If it feels like prices are on a roller coaster ride during the holidays, you’re not imagining things.
item.dc:creator: Amanda Barroso, Fox 5

item.title: Biden proposes Medicare, Medicaid cover costly weight-loss drugs like like Wegovy or Ozempic
item.description: A bipartisan coalition of congressional members have lobbied for the drugs to be covered by Medicare, saying it could save the government from spending billions of dollars on treating chronic ailments that stem from obesity.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: A voting machine firm suing Fox News now wants to probe Murdoch family trust fight
item.description: Lawyers for a voting machine company that’s suing Fox News want to question founder Rupert Murdoch about his contentious efforts to change his family trust, the attorneys told a court Monday.
item.dc:creator: JENNIFER PELTZ, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Walmart executive says some prices might rise if Trump's tariffs take effect
item.description: A Walmart executive warned that President-elect Trump’s plans to raise tariffs on imports could drive the retail giant to increase the price of store items.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, WFLA, NBC
